name: sherpa
description: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.
